app.name: Algorithm muujinta
app.unexpectedError: Khalad lama filaan ah ayaa dhacay

home.subtitle: Qiimee meel kasta oo noloshaada ka mid ah - ogow dhibcahaaga isku toosinta

dashboard.title: Muujinta Taariikhda Dabagalka Algorithm
dashboard.subtitle: Lasoco horumarkaaga wakhti ka dib
dashboard.tryWiderRange: Isku day kala duwanaansho ballaadhan ama dooro xilli kale.
dashboard.completeFirst: Dhammeystir qiimeyntaada ugu horreysa si aad u aragto horumarkaaga iyo isbeddelladaada halkan.

focusAreas.title: Meelaha diirada la saaray
focusAreas.subtitle: 3-da qaybood ee dhibcaha ugu hooseeya - hagaajinta kuwan waxay keenaysaa faa'iidooyinka ugu weyn.
focusAreas.empty: Dhameystir kulamo badan si aad u aragto talooyinka aaga diirada la shaqsiyeeyay.

settings.title: Dejinta Appka
settings.saveLastSessionDesc: Hore u buuxi jawaabaha fadhigii ugu dambeeyay ee la dhammaystiray.
settings.resetProgressDesc: Tirtir dhammaan jawaabaha la keydiyay oo bilow cusub.
settings.targetScoreDesc: Deji dhibco gool (1,000-10,000) si aad ula socoto horumarkaaga dashboardka.
settings.clearConfirmMessage: Tani waxay si joogto ah u tirtiri doontaa dhammaan jawaabahaaga hadda lamana noqon karo.
settings.goalErrorRange: Fadlan geli dhibco u dhexeeya 1,000 iyo 10,000

questionnaire.resetMessage: Tani waxay nadiifin doontaa jawaab kasta oo waxay ka bilaabi doontaa meel eber ah. Tan lama celin karo.

submitHint.zero: 0 ee {total} su'aalaha ayaa looga jawaabay - su'aalaha aan laga jawaabin ugu yaraan
submitHint.partial: {remaining} su'aasha hadhay - su'aalaha aan jawaabaha lahayn ugu yaraan | {remaining} su'aalaha ayaa hadhsan - su'aalaha aan laga jawaabin ayaa ugu yar
submitHint.complete: Dhammaan su'aalaha ayaa ka jawaabay - diyaar u ah in la gudbiyo!

submitTitle.zero: Ka jawaab su'aalaha qaarkood si aad u dhammaystirto qiimayntaada
submitTitle.partial: {remaining} su'aal ayaa hadhay | {remaining} su'aalo ayaa hadhsan

questionnaire.keyboardHint: Talo: Isticmaal ← → si aad u dhex socoto · 1–9/0 si aad u qiimeyso

onboarding.step0Body1: Qalabkani waxa uu kaa caawinayaa in aad cabbirto sida maskaxdaada, caadooyinkaaga, iyo falalkaaga maalinlaha ah ay isu waafajiyaan gaaritaanka yoolalkaaga. Su'aal kasta uga jawaab si daacad ah si aad u hesho dhibcahaaga hadda.
onboarding.step0Body2: Buuxi su'aalo-ururinta waqtiyo joogto ah si aad ula socoto kobacaada waqti ka dib oo aad aragto meelaha u baahan dareenka ugu badan.
onboarding.step1Body: Su'aal kastaa waxay u qalantaa tiro dhibcood oo go'an. Ku qiimee naftaada miisaan 1-10 ah su'aal kasta. Qiimaynta 10 waxay ka dhigan tahay inaad si buuxda u mabda'a tahay; 1 macnaheedu waa ma aadan bilaabin.
onboarding.goodNote: Aasaaska adag - qolka si ay u koraan
onboarding.needsWorkNote: Marka hore diirada saar waxyaabaha aasaasiga ah
onboarding.step2Title: Xogtaadu waxay ahaanaysaa mid gaar ah
onboarding.step2Body1: Dhammaan jawaabahaaga iyo taariikhda dhibcaha waxa lagu kaydiyaa gudaha qalabkaaga iyadoo la adeegsanayo xogta SQLite sir ah. Wax server ah looma soo diro ogolaanshahaaga cad la'aanteed
onboarding.step2Body2: Qaabka wadaaga fac-wadaaga ee ikhtiyaariga ah wuxuu kuu ogolaanayaa inaad aragto isku darka dhibcaha isticmaalayaasha kale ee aan la sheegin. Waxa kaliya oo ay wadaagtaa qoraal kooban oo si qarsoodi ah loo saxeexay - waligaa ha ka jawaabin shaqsigaaga.
onboarding.readyText: Diyaar ma u tahay? Aan helno dhibcahaaga gundhigga.

sharing.title: Wadaagista Shabakadda Anonymous
sharing.description: Ikhtiyaar ahaan ugu biir natiijooyinkaaga si qarsoodi ah shabakada caalamiga ah. Magaca, iimaylka, ciwaanka IP-ga, ama aqoonsiga aaladda waligeed lama wadaagin.
sharing.enabled: Wadaagista waa la oggolaaday - wax ku biirinta shabakada
sharing.activeBadge: ✓ Dhibcahaaga qarsoodiga ah waxaa lala wadaagayaa asxaabta
sharing.enableNote: Awood si aad u aragto darajadaada boqolleyda marka la barbar dhigo shabakada caalamiga ah.

chartActions.copyFailed: nuqul ka mid ah waa guuldareystay - kilibboodhka lama heli karo

resume.continueLastSession: Ka sii wad Kalfadhigii u dambeeyay?
resume.historicalBody: Jawaabahaagii fadhigii u dambeeyay ee la dhammaystiray horay ayaa loo raray. Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad qiimayaashaas u dhigto meel bilow ah, ama aad ku bilawdo xog-ururinta gebi ahaanba madhan?
resume.activeBody: Waxaad haysataa fadhi socda Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad dib u bilowdo meeshii aad ka tagtay, ama aad bilowdo qiimayn cusub?
resume.clearWarning: ⚠️ Tani waxay nadiifin doontaa dhammaan jawaabaha hadda jira. Ma hubtaa?

update.releaseNotesFallback: Booqo bogga siideynta si aad u soo dejiso nuqulkii ugu dambeeyay.
